---
name: Bug Report
about: Report an error in a decklist, analysis, card data, or script
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug report

**Type of issue**
- [ ] Incorrect card in decklist (illegal, wrong set code, wrong count)
- [ ] Wrong card data in `card_data/` CSV
- [ ] Script error (`fetch_and_categorize_cards.py`)
- [ ] Analysis error (incorrect matchup assessment, wrong card reasoning)
- [ ] Documentation error

**Location**
<!-- File path, deck name, or card name -->

**Description**
<!-- What is wrong? -->

**Expected**
<!-- What should it say/do? -->

**Evidence**
<!-- Link to official ruling, Limitless, PTCGLive screenshot, etc. -->
